title: andropogon canus
intro: Andropogon canus, also known as buffalo grass, is a perennial grass species native to the Great Plains region of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Andropogon canus include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Andropogon canus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
